repos.name: claude-code
repos.description_original: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
repos.description_cn: 一款 Shell 打造的AI Agent 框架，支持构建自主决策的智能体应用，今日热度爆棚
repos.domain: AI Agent 智能体 / 开发工具
repos.target_audience: AI 应用开发者、自动化工程师
repos.problem_solved: 构建自主决策的 AI 智能体

repos.name: claude-howto
repos.description_original: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
